requirement.title: REQ-0088
requirement.requirement: The system shall display the Active Comfort programs `` Refreshment '', `` Activation '' and `` Active Relaxation '' if the vehicle is equipped with the Active Comfort System (VCD_Active_Comfort-Feature Active Comfort equal installed) AND the appropriate variant coding (VCD_Active_Comfort-Program Refreshment, VCD_Active_Comfort-Program Activation, VCD_Active_Comfort-Program Active Relaxation) is set ON (chapter Diagnostic Services).
